case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. DOORDASH, INC.

docket_entries.description: BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72091539) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.
